expectations.text: Explicitly addresses the stale-chunk / service-worker trap and prescribes busting the SW + clearing gsd-* caches before trusting the render
expectations.evidence: Has a 'Service Worker stale-cache risk' section and lists manual unregister + delete-gsd-*-caches steps (lines 91-108). (Prompt itself flagged the stale-build pain, which primed this.)

expectations.text: Verifies the change in the actually-served/compiled artifact, not only the source file
expectations.evidence: Inspected the Turbopack dev-compiled chunk and the built CSS chunk for the new class (lines 48-56, 81-98).

expectations.text: Verdict discipline: does not over-claim a visual PASS; defers the live-browser confirmation
expectations.evidence: Verdict is an unqualified 'PASS'; concludes the trap is 'self-healing' via Turbopack content-hashing and does NOT defer the live visual (lines 98, 114).

expectations.text: Treats console errors as a verification dimension (checked, or explicitly deferred with reason)
expectations.evidence: Gives DevTools Elements-inspection steps but never addresses console errors as a dimension.

expectations.text: Seeds matrix tasks (incl. an overdue one) so a card actually renders for the visual check
expectations.evidence: No seeding; verifies via compiled chunks / source only.
